name: error-sound
description: VS Code doesn't play any sound when a terminal command fails — this extension changes that! Automatically plays a sound effect when your terminal command returns an error. Choose from a variety of built-in sound effects to make your debugging experience more fun and noticeable.

scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
